# Mecanicadesuelos — Antofagasta

> Geotechnical engineering services in Antofagasta, Chile.

- Website: https://antofagasta.mecanicadesuelos.co/

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Antofagasta, Chile.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
